into_the_wild.name: Ipanema Beach
into_the_wild.description: One of Rio's most famous beaches, a vibrant spot perfect for swimming and enjoying the iconic Rio beach culture. Highly recommended for both relaxation and people-watching.

into_the_wild.name: Copacabana Beach
into_the_wild.description: Another iconic Rio beach offering beautiful seaside views and a lively atmosphere. Great for experiencing the classic Rio beach experience.

into_the_wild.name: Selarón Steps
into_the_wild.description: A colorful outdoor attraction featuring hand-painted steps that create a stunning visual experience. A popular hike destination with great photo opportunities.

into_the_wild.name: Maracanã Stadium
into_the_wild.description: Historic football stadium in Rio where you can watch matches between teams like Flamengo and Vasco. An authentic way to experience Rio's sports culture.

into_the_wild.name: Corcovado/Cristo Redentor
into_the_wild.description: The famous Christ the Redeemer statue with panoramic views of Rio. Can be visited via cable car or helicopter ride for an unforgettable sightseeing experience.

gram_worthy_spots.name: Pão de Açúcar (Sugarloaf Mountain)
gram_worthy_spots.description: Iconic Rio landmark offering spectacular views and photogenic vistas. A must-visit spot for capturing stunning Rio scenery.

gram_worthy_spots.name: Cristo Redentor Above the Clouds
gram_worthy_spots.description: The Christ the Redeemer statue photographed above a sea of clouds creates a surreal and breathtaking image. Perfect for dramatic landscape photography.

gram_worthy_spots.name: Ipanema Neighborhood
gram_worthy_spots.description: Walkable neighborhood with excellent architecture, cafes, and parks. A picturesque area known for its charming streets and vibrant atmosphere.

off_the_beaten_path.name: Petropolis
off_the_beaten_path.description: A nearby mountain town worth visiting for a day trip from Rio. Offers a different perspective and escape from the main city.

off_the_beaten_path.name: Teresopolis
off_the_beaten_path.description: Another nearby mountain destination accessible from Rio, offering an alternative experience outside the main tourist areas.

off_the_beaten_path.name: Niteroi
off_the_beaten_path.description: A city across from Rio known for being more tranquil and peaceful than the main city. A quieter alternative for those seeking a calmer vibe.
